items.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.original_summary: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
items.chinese_summary: 跟进报道：Anthropic 就美国政府出口管制指令暂停 Fable 5 与 Mythos 5 全部访问进行官方表态，确认这是落地执行而非传闻。相对此前模型正常可调用，现在通过 API 调这两个模型名将直接被拒绝或返回 403/区域不可用错误。涉及区域可用性硬性变更。
items.backend_focus: 立即行动：所有代码中移除 model="fable-5"、model="mythos-5" 的硬编码引用，迁移至 Claude Opus 4.5 / Sonnet 4.x；同时在 API client 层的错误处理中增加对 403/region-blocked 的 fallback 分支。

items.title: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude.
items.original_summary: Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America. Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glas...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 推出「Claude Tag」，被描述为团队与 Claude 协作的新方式，分类为 Product。相对此前主要通过 Projects 与 Workspaces 协作，引入 Tag 作为新的组织/调用维度。具体 API 字段与模型版本尚未在摘要中披露。
items.backend_focus: 关注项：暂未公布 Tag 字段在 messages API 中的具体位置与权限模型；建议先在 sandbox 环境试用，关注 anthropic-sdk-python / TypeScript SDK 是否新增 tags[] 参数再纳入生产。

Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries. Produ...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 启动「Claude Corps」全国奖学金项目，面向早期职业者推广 AI 社区受益。相对此前纯技术/政策类动作，这次是人才与品牌项目。属品牌/公益，不涉及 API 字段、模型版本或 SDK 变更。
items.backend_focus: 无。属人才/品牌项目，与工程无关。

items.title: Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries.
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across Am...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 扩展「Project Glasswing」到约 150 个新组织、覆盖 15 个以上国家，是企业 AI 落地计划的扩容。相对此前范围较小，这次规模显著扩大。属企业/社会公益项目，不影响 API、模型或 SDK。
items.backend_focus: 无。属企业合作/公益项目，不涉及 API/SDK 变更；如团队所在组织被纳入，可申请使用 Glasswing 配套的 Claude 配额。

items.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consi
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across Am...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布「Claude Opus 4.8」，作为 Opus 系列的升级版本，在 coding、agentic 任务与专业工作负载上表现更强。相对 Claude Opus 4.5，新版本进一步强化长任务与工具调用能力。属于新模型版本上线，旧 Opus 4.x 通常会进入 deprecation 时间线。
items.backend_focus: 升级动作：将 model 字段切到 "claude-opus-4-8"，context window 与 max_tokens 是否变化需查 release notes；建议保留 4.5 作为 fallback 至少 1 个季度，关注 anthropic-sdk-python 对 4.8 的 tool_use 与 prompt caching 支持。

items.title: Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 在首尔开设办公室并宣布与韩国 AI 生态的多个新合作伙伴，是 APAC 区域市场拓展公告。相对此前以美/欧为主的布局，这次在韩国落地本地团队与合作。属区域扩张公告，不影响 API 端点、模型版本或 SDK。
items.backend_focus: 关注项：若团队有韩国/东北亚数据驻留需求，关注 Anthropic 是否在首尔区域开放 Claude API 端点与数据驻留承诺；当前在 API base URL 仍需手动指定。

items.title: Results from the first Anthropic Public Record
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布首个「Public Record」结果，是公司透明度与公共记录机制的第一期内容。属于政策/治理信息披露，不涉及任何模型版本、API 字段或 SDK 变更。
items.backend_focus: 无。属政策/治理信息披露，与工程无关。

items.title: TCS and Anthropic partner to bring Claude to regulated industries
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 与 TCS 达成合作，将 Claude 引入受监管行业（金融、医疗等），是企业合作公告。这不涉及 API 新参数、模型新版本或 SDK 变更，调用方继续使用现有 model 名。
items.backend_focus: 无。属企业合作公告，开发者继续使用现有 model 字段、max_tokens、tool_use 等；如需受监管行业合规支持，关注后续是否发布 HIPAA/SOC2 专用端点。

items.title: DXC will integrate Claude into the systems banks, airlines, and other regulated industries rely on
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 与 DXC 达成合作，将 Claude 集成进银行、航空等受监管行业依赖的核心系统。相对此前以科技/互联网客户为主，这次锁定关键基础设施行业。属企业合作公告，API 行为不变。
items.backend_focus: 无。属企业合作公告，无 API/SDK 变更；如团队对接银行业客户，可关注 DXC 是否提供基于 Claude 的私有化部署参考架构。
